import os
import sys
import torch
from model import create_model
from dataset import DomainNetDataset
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader

print('torch version', torch.__version__)
print('cuda available', torch.cuda.is_available())

try:
    device = torch.device('cuda:0')
    print('Creating model...')
    model = create_model('dinov2', num_classes=345, pretrained=True)
    model = model.to(device)
    print('Model created OK, params:', sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters()))
except Exception as e:
    print('MODEL ERROR:', e)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
    sys.exit(1)

try:
    data_root = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
    print('Loading dataset from', data_root)
    ds = DomainNetDataset(data_root, os.path.join(data_root, 'train.txt'))
    print('Dataset size:', len(ds))
    img, label = ds[0]
    print('First sample img size:', img.size, 'label:', label)
    loader = DataLoader(ds, batch_size=2, num_workers=0, shuffle=False)
    batch = next(iter(loader))
    print('Batch img shape:', batch[0].shape, 'labels:', batch[1])
    out = model(batch[0].to(device))
    print('Forward pass OK, output shape:', out.shape)
except Exception as e:
    print('DATA/FWD ERROR:', e)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
    sys.exit(1)

print('All checks passed.')
